{{CargoRelic
|name=Gee Virus
|class_id=21301
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=01-04
|source=
|description=On Jan 4, 2104 AD, a pathogen suddenly emerged and caused a worldwide panic.<br>This pathogen is said to have been created by Demon Gods. In order to fight against Earth's Will, they created a new pathogen based on some existing pathogen. This pathogen was immune to all the antibodies at the time and was known as the perfect pathogen.
|fame=40
|art=41
|fth=42
|civ=36
|tech=69
|ss1=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +40<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +4
|ss2=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +80<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +8
|ss3=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12
|ss4=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20
|ss5=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28
|ss7=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: Snail RUSH +30
|skill2=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: Snail HP +300
}}
